name: claude-antigravity
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-antigravity plugin, which lets Claude consult Google Gemini via the Antigravity CLI for second opinions, fact-checks, code review, and an explicit council mode where Claude and Gemini deliberate as a consilium or a debate toward the single most truthful answer.

plugins.name: claude-antigravity
plugins.description: Consult Google Gemini through the Antigravity CLI (agy) for second opinions, fact-checks, and code review, plus an explicit council mode where Claude and Gemini deliberate as a consilium or a debate toward the single most truthful answer.
